fixed_subset_evaluation.reason: No builtin TFLite candidate passed Keras-vs-TFLite numeric parity.

deployment_decision.reason: No standard builtin TFLite artifact both loads and matches the fine-tuned Keras checkpoint within 1e-4.
recommendations: Do not deploy the existing RGNet TFLite files.
Do not copy any retry artifact into Flutter.

For RGNet mobile deployment, either retrain/fine-tune under a float32 export-compatible policy and revalidate metrics, or implement an export-specific architecture that preserves mixed-policy numerics while lowering to builtin TFLite.
Continue to treat the fine-tuned Keras checkpoint as teacher-only until a parity-passing builtin TFLite exists.
